scripts.build: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-template-assets.mjs
scripts.test: tsx --test src/core/config/schema.test.ts src/core/init/init.test.ts src/core/templates/renderer.test.ts src/core/tasks/task.test.ts src/core/docs/adopt.test.ts src/core/docs/prompt.test.ts src/core/modes/mode.test.ts
